entries.description: Added tier-orthogonal pathAwareCritique attribute (seed->record-once->immutable) + start_session --path-aware-critique wiring.
Implemented P_set=any(P_task) blast-radius predicate (ai_router/blast_radius.py) + ASCII CLI; advisory recommend, not auto-set.
Defined multi-provider critique artifact: JSON Schema + pure-Python validator (schema-parity) + schema doc + example.
Cross-provider session verification (gpt-5.4): R1 ISSUES_FOUND (1 real validator-parity Major fixed; 2 false positives disproven) -> R2 VERIFIED.
Implemented validate_path_aware_critique_gate() in ai_router/path_aware_critique.py (posture-agnostic ok/not-ok, never-raising, tier-orthogonal; mirrors validate_dedicated_verification).

Wired the net-new content-aware gate into close_session.run() after the dedicated_verification gate: set-terminal only; required=hard-TTY/soft-headless, advisory=always-soft, none=skip; import inside the broad fail-open guard.
Added 19 tests (13 close-gate end-to-end x level x tier + fail-posture TTY/headless; 6 gate-validator unit). Full ai_router suite green: 1391 passed / 1 skipped.

Cross-provider session verification (gpt-5.4): R1 ISSUES_FOUND 1 Major (import outside fail-open guard) FIXED + 1 Minor (doc mojibake) DISPROVEN as a cp1252 harness artifact (files are valid UTF-8) -> R2 VERIFIED.
